arts.ttl: Liverpool's current feelings on new Salah, Van Dijk contracts revealed
arts.sum: Seismic updates about the future of Liverpool's out-of-contract trio Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold suggest good news is on the way.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah Liverpool contract latest, Reds' 'poor' approach, Saudi shirt and Arne Slot view
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to lose Mohamed Salah on a free transfer this summer as things stand, with the Egyptian giving repeated hints that this will be his final season at Anfield following eight years
